new_value: {"notes":"Recovery implementation is isolated in /Volumes/Attic/Opencode/opencode/lichen-rust-rpl on integration/rust-rpl-recovery. Full pre-cleanup state preserved at refs/recovery/rpl-before-rustfmt-cleanup-20260717 (d0bad46e). Current six-file patch covers RFC-correct DAO codec/config, rank/version/parent admissibility, bounded grouped multi-parent DAO state, Path/DAO sequence handling, finite lifetimes, deterministic route rebuild, DIO config/Trickle, and multi-hop Non-Storing forwarding. Local gates 2026-07-17: cargo test -p lichen-rpl --all-features PASS (94 unit + 5 integration); cargo clippy -p lichen-rpl --all-features --all-targets -- -D warnings PASS; cargo test -p lichen-node --features std PASS (143 unit, 1 doctest, 1 ignored); git diff --check PASS. Remaining blockers: .44.7 end-to-end DAO origin authentication; .44.9 prefix Targets; .44.4/.44.6 remain open behind origin auth; .60 pre-existing node feature/no_std/clippy failures. No AWS is required for this Rust-only slice."}
